rounds.name: The Desk Command Center
rounds.premise: Turn a single laptop screen into a Pentagon-grade global situational awareness center.
rounds.hook: You don't need top-secret clearance to see global crises unfold in real-time—you just need this open-source dashboard.
rounds.motif: Targeting reticle sweeping across 56 geographic map layers
rounds.why_it_fits: Directly builds on the geopolitical tracking, military signal correlation, and dual-map engine features.

rounds.name: Planetary Signal Network
rounds.premise: Treat the entire planet as a single organism transmitting live data streams into an AI brain.
rounds.hook: Right now, 500 news feeds, 29 stock markets, and escalation signals are firing at once—this AI connects every single node.
rounds.motif: Luminescent data pulses travelling across a 3D globe.gl model
rounds.why_it_fits: Leverages the 500 curated feeds, 15 categories, 3D globe visualization, and cross-stream correlation capabilities.

rounds.name: The Zero-Cloud Agency
rounds.premise: Build an air-gapped threat monitoring system running entirely on local hardware without API keys.
rounds.hook: No SaaS subscriptions, no API keys, and zero cloud tracking—how to run a private global intelligence agency on your local machine.
rounds.motif: Terminal command outputs morphing into high-density WebGL dashboards
sections: The Trap of Centralized SaaS Dashboards
rounds.why_it_fits: Highlights the privacy-focused local AI feature powered by Ollama alongside AGPL v3 self-hosting.
